name: Math Multiply
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode

class MathMultiplyNode(BaseNode):
    name = "Math Multiply"
    description = "Multiplies two numbers."
    
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.icon_path = "icons/multiply.svg"
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-START]
        self.add_input("a", "float", widget_type="float")
        self.add_input("b", "float", widget_type="float")
        self.add_output("result", "float")
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-END]
        
    async def execute(self, inputs):
        a_val = inputs.get('a')
        b_val = inputs.get('b')
        a = float(a_val) if a_val is not None else 0.0
        b = float(b_val) if b_val is not None else 0.0
        return {'result': a * b}

def register_node():
    return MathMultiplyNode
